data.title: Chesapeake Utilities Announces Appointment of Chief Transformation Officer and Chief Accounting Officer
data.description: Chesapeake Utilities Corporation (NYSE: CPK) made public in Dover, Del., on April 1, 2026, about two new leadership appointments that highlight the Company's dedication to operational quality and sustained expansion. Starting from April 1, a senior vice president along with the chief accounting officer...

data.title: Regional Natural Gas Storage Helped Southern Californians Avoid Over $120 Million In Energy Costs During Winter Storm Fern
data.description: On April 1, 2026, in Los Angeles, the Southern California Gas Company (SoCalGas) has collaborated with state officials and regulators to improve natural gas storage capability. This is crucial for strengthening energy system resilience over the past few years. The company has invested significant resources in this effort, with an emphasis on staying prepared for potential energy crises.

data.title: iAutomation Expands Automation Solutions with Festo Across the Mid-Atlantic and Southeast
data.description: iAutomation is pleased to share that they are now authorized to provide expanded automation solutions and local expertise to customers in the Mid-Atlantic and Southeast regions. Based in Franklin, Massachusetts, the company announced this update on April 1, 2026. iAutomation, known for offering top-notch industrial automation solutions, aims to serve a larger customer base with this development.

data.title: HERITAGE NOLA BANCORP, INC. ANNOUNCES COMPLETION OF PURCHASE AND ASSUMPTION TRANSACTION BETWEEN HERITAGE BANK OF ST. TAMMANY AND ONPATH FEDERAL CREDIT UNION
data.description: On April 1, 2026, in Covington, Louisiana, Heritage Nola Bancorp, Inc. (also known as Heritage NOLA Bancorp) revealed that they are the holding company for Heritage Bank of St. Tammany. The company's stock is listed as OTC Pink under the symbol HRGG. They joined hands with OnPath Federal Credit Union. This collaboration began on April 1, 2026, aiming to enhance their services and offerings.

data.title: Arsenal Capital Partners Completes Sale of ATP Adhesive Systems to Henkel
data.description: On April 1, 2026, Arsenal Capital Partners disclosed the successful sale of Swiss-based ATP Adhesive Systems, a portfolio company, as part of their efforts in developing industrial growth and healthcare firms. Arsenal Capital Partners is a middle-market private equity firm dedicated to this specialization. The completion of the sale marks a significant milestone for the company and the transaction is poised to impact their financial standing positively.

data.title: Greenbrier announces 6% increase to quarterly dividend
data.description: Lake Oswego, OR - The Greenbrier Companies disclosed a quarterly cash dividend of $0.34 per share, scheduled to be paid on May 11, 2026, to shareholders as of record on April 20, 2026. This uptick from $0.32 per share marks a 6% rise.

data.title: FLAGSTAR BANK, N.A. APPOINTS ELI MILLER TO BOARD OF DIRECTORS
data.description: In Hicksville, New York, on April 1, 2026, Flagstar Bank, N.A. (NYSE: FLG) revealed the addition of Eli H. Miller from Liberty Strategic Capital to their Board of Directors. This appointment, effective immediately, brings Miller's expertise as the Senior Managing Director at Liberty to the Bank's leadership team. This move signifies a significant development for Flagstar Bank, with expectations of leveraging Miller's experience to guide strategic decisions for the company moving forward.

data.title: Primo Brands Announces Date for 2026 First Quarter Earnings Release and Conference Call
data.description: In a recent update on April 1, 2026, Primo Brands Corporation (NYSE: PRMB) from Tampa, FL, and Stamford, CT, revealed their plan to disclose the financial outcomes for the first quarter of 2026 on Thursday, May 7, 2026, around 6:00 a.m. Eastern Time. The Company, often referred to as Primo Brands, is expected to provide a comprehensive overview of its performance during this time period.

data.title: FORTUNE MEDIA AND GREAT PLACE TO WORK NAME GRAINGER TO '100 BEST COMPANIES TO WORK FOR' IN 2026
data.description: Chicago-based Grainger, a prominent distributor of maintenance, repair, and operating products and services, has recently been honored as one of Fortune's top 100 Best Companies to Work For® in 2026. This recognition was bestowed upon Grainger by Great Place To Work® and Fortune Media. The company is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol GWW. A key player in the industry, Grainger's achievement in this regard underscores its commitment to providing a positive and fulfilling work environment.
Elon Musk, Walmart Heirs See Q1 Wealth Gains: Bezos, Ellison, Zuckerberg & Others Hit By Stock Losses

data.title: Camden Property Trust Named One of Fortune’s 100 Best Companies to Work For®
data.description: In Houston, Camden Property Trust (NYSE:CPT) has been ranked 13th on Fortune's 100 Best Companies to Work For list. This marks the Company's 19th consecutive year earning this recognition. Executive Vice Chairman, Keith Oden, expressed gratitude for the honor. Access the full list and related articles in the upcoming April/May issue of Fortune and online.

data.title: Arcosa, Inc. Completes Sale of Barge Business
data.description: In Dallas, Arcosa, Inc. (NYSE: ACA) disclosed the sale of its inland barge business, Arcosa Marine Products, Inc., to Wynnchurch Capital, L.P. for $450 million in cash. The deal also includes customary transaction adjustments. The Company plans to utilize the net after-tax amount from the sale to bolster its core growth areas and lower existing debt. Antonio Carrillo, CEO of Arcosa, highlighted the strategic move towards enhancing key business segments.

data.title: Broadstone Net Lease Schedules First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call
data.description: VICTOR, N.Y.-- (BUSINESS WIRE)-- Broadstone Net Lease has announced the scheduling of its first quarter 2026 earnings release and conference call. The company will be releasing its earnings report for the first quarter of 2026, with the conference call to discuss these results. This event is significant for stakeholders and investors, providing insights into the company's financial performance. Stay tuned for further updates on this important financial event.

data.title: NETSTREIT Corp. Announces Dates for First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call
data.description: NETSTREIT Corp., a leading owner of single-tenant net lease properties across the country, revealed plans to unveil its financial results for the first quarter of 2026 on April 20, 2026, after market hours on the NYSE. Alongside this, a conference call is scheduled for April 21, 2026, at 11:00 AM Eastern Time. For those interested, a live webcast can be accessed through the Investor Relations page on NETSTREIT's official website at www.NETSTREIT.com.

data.title: FCPT Appoints Michael Friedland to the Board of Directors
data.description: A real estate investment trust based in Mill Valley, California, Four Corners Property Trust (NYSE:FCPT) has disclosed the appointment of Michael Friedland to its Board of Directors, effective April 1, 2026. FCPT specializes in owning high-quality, net-leased restaurant and retail properties. The CEO of FCPT, Bill Lenehan, expressed excitement about Friedland joining the Board, highlighting his extensive thirty years of experience.

data.title: Agree Realty Announces First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release Date and Conference Call Information
data.description: In Royal Oak, Michigan, Agree Realty Corporation (NYSE: ADC) disclosed plans to unveil its Q1 2026 operating performance post-market closure on April 21, 2026. They have scheduled a conference call on April 22, 2026, at 9:00 AM ET to go over the results. Stakeholders and interested individuals can join the call through teleconference at USA Toll Free (800) 715-9871, International (646) 307-196 or via webcast.

data.title: Citadel Securities-Backed EDX Markets Files For National Trust Bank Charter
data.description: A cryptocurrency exchange called EDX Markets, supported by Citadel Securities and Fidelity Digital Assets, has submitted an application with the Office of the Comptroller of the Currency (OCC) for a national trust bank charter. The OCC has not specified a timeframe for reviewing the application. If approved, this charter would bring EDX's custody, management, and trading functions under the oversight of banking regulators. Acquiring a trust bank charter would equip EDX with the necessary regulatory structure to cater to institutional investors seeking custody solutions.

data.title: Borr Drilling Limited - Contracting Updates
data.description: Today in Hamilton, Bermuda, Borr Drilling Limited (trading on NYSE and Euronext Growth Oslo under BORR) shared news of securing new contracts for four premium jack-up rigs. Specifically, the Prospector 5 in West Africa has secured a binding commitment, highlighting the company's ongoing success in the region. This development underscores Borr Drilling's strategic growth, with these new contracts expected to boost their operational capacity significantly.

data.title: In HelloNation, Real Estate Experts Holly Abel Grimm and Rich Grimm Explain Tuscarawas County Home Pricing
data.description: A recent report delves into the impact of pricing, timing, and property condition on sales in the current housing market of New Philadelphia. With Tuscarawas County being the focal point, sellers are urged to carefully consider these factors for optimal outcomes. The report emphasizes the significance of setting the right price, as it can significantly affect the final sale proceeds. Timing is also highlighted as a crucial element, indicating that certain periods may be more beneficial for sellers. Moreover, ensuring the property's top condition is stressed, as it can attract potential buyers. Overall, sellers in Tuscarawas County are advised to strategize on pricing, timing, and property upkeep to enhance their selling experience.

data.title: Cousins Properties Upsizes Unsecured Revolving Credit Facility to $1.2 Billion
data.description: Cousins Properties (NYSE: CUZ) disclosed they have finalized a new $1.2 billion unsecured credit facility for a duration of five years. This newly acquired credit facility supersedes their previous one, which was set to expire.
